title: BEM-866 extract inputs
objective:
Run script:
"""
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
data = json.loads(result.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if result.exists() else {}
stderr = str(data.get('stderr') or '')
stdout = str(data.get('stdout') or '')
text = stderr + '\n' + stdout
# Make filename markers for currently sent inputs and any bracketed unexpected list if present.
sent = data.get('inputs') if isinstance(data.get('inputs'), dict) else {}
sent_keys = list(sent.keys())
low = text.lower()
if 'unexpected inputs provided' in low:
    code = 'UNEXPECTED_INPUTS'
else:
    code = 'NO_UNEXPECTED_TEXT'
slug = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in ('_'.join(sent_keys) or 'no_sent_keys'))[:140]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_UNEXPECTED_INPUTS_' + code + '_SENT_' + slug + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 unexpected inputs\nCode: ' + code + '\nSent inputs:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k for k in sent_keys) + '\n\nSTDERR:\n' + stderr[:3000] + '\n\nSTDOUT:\n' + stdout[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('unexpected inputs extracted: ' + code)
"""
No issue comments.
